message:
Add workflow export functions to core package

Export workflow-related functions from core/export:
- generateWorkflowSkillMd: Generate SKILL.md for workflow steps
- generateWorkflowMarkdown: Generate standalone markdown for workflows

The workflow markdown includes:
- Title and description
- When to use section
- Ordered steps with prompt content and handoff notes
- Attribution footer

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
